name: SHOE STATION GROUP INC
business: Shoe Carnival, Inc. is an omnichannel retailer of footwear and accessories for the family. The company operates 426 stores under two banners: Shoe Carnival (targeting moderate to low-income families) and Shoe Station (targeting more affluent customers). It sells national name brands such as Nike, Skechers, and Crocs.

exposures.sentence: We operate a retail-focused business model designed to deliver a differentiated footwear shopping experience featuring national name brands.
Our e-commerce platform is an extension of our physical stores and is designed to enhance our customer's shopping experience.
Our technology department monitors and regularly tests compliance with our protocols, provides regular updates to employees and management and conducts annual training.

catalysts.event: Shareholder vote on corporate name change to Shoe Station Group, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On November 13, 2025, we announced that our Board of Directors unanimously approved changing our corporate name to Shoe Station Group, Inc., subject to shareholder approval at our Annual Meeting of Shareholders in June 2026.

catalysts.event: Rebanner approximately 21 stores during the first half of Fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We now expect to rebanner approximately 21 stores during the first half of Fiscal 2026 while this evaluation is conducted.
